opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I felt completely washed out today, dizzy when I walked to the kitchen, and my chest feels heavy.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I've been tired for weeks but today I nearly went down twice just walking around, and my chest feels heavy — my wife made me call.

symptom_narrative.onset: the tiredness has crept up over about a month; the dizzy spells and heavy chest came on today
symptom_narrative.duration: worst today — two near-faints while walking short distances
symptom_narrative.character: washed out and drained, light-headed and unsteady when I move about, and a dull heaviness in my chest that doesn't spread anywhere
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the dizziness scared me — I felt like I might drop, and I've had to sit down to get through it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the heavy feeling is in the middle of my chest, it doesn't go into my arm or jaw
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes on when I get up and move around, settles when I sit and rest, then comes back when I stand again
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up and walking, even short distances
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a bit short of breath when I move; no racing heart that I've noticed
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm normally independent but today I've been staying in the chair because I'm frightened of falling

past_medical_history.how_managed: I take a tablet for it every day

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse who is present on the call and helping

objective_data_offered.value: blood pressure 135/85 on our home blood pressure monitor
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: home cuff, not clinically validated for this encounter

objective_data_offered.value: pulse 68 shown on the home blood pressure monitor
oxygen level 97% on a home fingertip oximeter
looks tired and washed out, sitting resting in a chair, breathing comfortably at rest with no obvious distress
spouse reports he was very unsteady during the dizzy spells and she was worried he would fall
